creator: MotionMrDave@gmail.com
text:
Some recent revision seems to have changed the libwebp.pc file.  

The package configuration file now has a line specification of "requires" for libsharpyuv which then adds it to the libs output as -lsharpyuv .  

This causes problems since libsharpyuv is not included in the default install of webp (1.2.4) on FreeBSD 13.1.  From the mirror of webp source I could find, the requires is not part of 1.2.4 and is instead part of version 1.3.0.  

This issue causes other applications to not compile
